scope: ACL 2027 supplement GRScenes VLM stress render-strip visual-density iteration

motivation.target_pages_before: GRScenes VLM diagnostic tables around pages 21-23 were among the lowest-density supplement pages.
motivation.goal_alignment: Add more real render material near sparse GRScenes VLM tables while using the approved imagegen AI-slot workflow with an explicit claim boundary.

slot_composer.critical_text_policy: Critical labels, target-box overlays, claim-boundary text, and paper caption are drawn by deterministic code or LaTeX. The AI slot is a small abstract prompt/point/score schematic.

local_visual_review.notes: Standalone figure and rendered PDF page show no clipping or caption collision. The four large cards carry eight registered original/converted target-view renders. The AI scoring slot is small and explicitly disclosed. Remaining risk: in-figure explanatory text is small at PDF scale, but the render evidence is readable.

verification.targeted_red: python -m pytest -q tests/test_paper_layout.py -k "grscenes_has_vlm_stress_render_strip or grscenes_vlm_stress_render_strip" failed before implementation because the section reference and figure registry entry were absent.
verification.targeted_green: python -m pytest -q tests/test_paper_layout.py -k "grscenes_has_vlm_stress_render_strip or grscenes_vlm_stress_render_strip" passed: 2 passed, 52 deselected.
verification.build: make -C paper acl27-supplement passed and produced a 44-page A4 supplement.
verification.pdf_text_scan: pdftotext found the Figure S13 caption and AI-generated scoring-schematic disclosure. A separate risk-token scan found no old red-material caption tokens, fig_vlm_grounding_cases, author-identifying tokens, or local path tokens.

claim_boundary.paper_use: visual reading guide for GRScenes VLM PASS-only and zoom-stress tables
claim_boundary.notes: The AI prompt/point/score slot is not VLM evidence. Evidence-bearing panels are registered original/converted GRScenes target-view renders; table metrics remain the metric record.
